# RPG-LE Subfile Program with SQL Integration

This workspace contains an RPG-LE subfile program that demonstrates SQL integration for IBM i development.

## Project Structure
- `/src/` - Source code files
  - `SUBFLPGM.RPGLE` - Main RPG-LE program
  - `SUBFLSF.DSPF` - Display file (DDS) for subfile interface
- `/docs/` - Documentation and reference materials
- `README.md` - Project overview and usage instructions

## Development Guidelines
- Follow IBM i naming conventions for files and variables
- Use SQL for database operations where appropriate
- Implement proper error handling for SQL operations
- Follow RPG-LE best practices for subfile processing
- Include appropriate comments for maintainability

## Code Style
- Use meaningful variable names with proper prefixes
- Implement structured programming techniques
- Use prototypes for procedure definitions
- Include proper copybooks for SQL and system APIs

## Testing
- Test subfile load/display operations
- Validate SQL query performance
- Test error handling scenarios
- Verify proper cursor management
